TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Heping Nsgan Heping o gaga Nsgan Taichung, kmpraan kana dxgal o 1,006.12 km¬≤, (dxgal dgiyaq o 900.79 km¬≤, dxgal pmblxan o 62.11 km¬≤). kmhbragan hiyi o 6,503, sapah o 2,544, seejiq tnpusu 3,838 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 59%(Embgala). Nsgan alang o seejiq klmukan ka pusu(hbaraw) balay. nyusan qpahan Nsgan Heping o niqan 8 alang ni maxal 13. 13 o, Sqoyaw , Tabuk , Slamaw , Lilang , M'ihu , Tgbin , L'olu , Kling , Pasing , Slamaw , Tbulan , S'yux , Hrung . pusupnyahan patas
S.PHON: ńß…ôpiŇč nsgan ńß…ôpiŇč o gaga nsgan tai ¶ńßuŇč, kmp…ĺaan kana dxgal o *,***.** km*, (dxgal dgijaq o ***.** km*, dxgal pmblxan o **.** km*). kmńßb…ĺagan ńßiji o *,***, sapańß o *,***, s…ô…ô…üiq tnpusu *,*** ńßiji, knńßb…ĺagan ńßiji o **%(…ômbgala). nsgan alaŇč o s…ô…ô…üiq klmukan ka pusu(ńßba…ĺaw) balaj. njusan qpańßan nsgan ńß…ôpiŇč o niqan * alaŇč ni maxal **. ** o, sqojaw , tabuk , slamaw , lilaŇč , m'ińßu , tgbin , l'olu , kliŇč , pasiŇč , slamaw , tbulan , s'jux , ńß…ĺuŇč . pusupnjańßan patas
S.FORM: Heping Nsgan Heping o gaga Nsgan Taichung, kmpraan kana dxgal o 1,006.12 km¬≤, (dxgal dgiyaq o 900.79 km¬≤, dxgal pmblxan o 62.11 km¬≤). kmhbragan hiyi o 6,503, sapah o 2,544, seejiq tnpusu 3,838 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 59%(Embgala). Nsgan alang o seejiq klmukan ka pusu(hbaraw) balay. nyusan qpahan Nsgan Heping o niqan 8 alang ni maxal 13. 13 o, Sqoyaw , Tabuk , Slamaw , Lilang , M'ihu , Tgbin , L'olu , Kling , Pasing , Slamaw , Tbulan , S'yux , Hrung . pusupnyahan patas
S.PHON: ńß…ôpiŇč nsgan ńß…ôpiŇč o gaga nsgan tai ¶ńßuŇč, kmp…ĺaan kana dxgal o *,***.** km*, (dxgal dgijaq o ***.** km*, dxgal pmblxan o **.** km*). kmńßb…ĺagan ńßiji o *,***, sapańß o *,***, s…ô…ô…üiq tnpusu *,*** ńßiji, knńßb…ĺagan ńßiji o **%(…ômbgala). nsgan alaŇč o s…ô…ô…üiq klmukan ka pusu(ńßba…ĺaw) balaj. njusan qpańßan nsgan ńß…ôpiŇč o niqan * alaŇč ni maxal **. ** o, sqojaw , tabuk , slamaw , lilaŇč , m'ińßu , tgbin , l'olu , kliŇč , pasiŇč , slamaw , tbulan , s'jux , ńß…ĺuŇč . pusupnjańßan patas
